errors.offlineDesc: The app needs an internet connection the first time it opens. Connect and try again.
errors.catalogDesc: Please try again in a moment.

grid.hint: Left-click to add · Right-click to remove

scanner.title: Scanner
scanner.alignHint: Align the sticker code in the box · codes like
scanner.useManual: Use the manual input below instead.

swaps.title: Swaps
swaps.emptyDesc: Keep collecting stickers and your extras will appear here.

login.tagline: Your assistant to complete the greatest World Cup sticker album of all time
login.description: Track your sticker collection for free. No passwords — just your email.
features: See your full list of missing stickers
Share what you're missing with friends via WhatsApp
See your duplicates and organize your swaps
login.linkSentTo: We sent a login link to
login.clickToSignIn: Click it to sign in — no password needed.

settings.title: Settings
settings.resetConfirmDesc: This will set all sticker quantities to zero. Your account and login will remain. This cannot be undone.

missing.emptyDesc: Congratulations, you have all the stickers.

sticker.removeDesc: This will mark it as not collected.

legal.version: Version 2026-05-12. Placeholder copy pending legal review.

privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.intro: Meu Album 2026 stores your account email and sticker collection progress in Supabase to sync your album across devices.
privacy.data: Anonymous usage analytics are collected only after you grant consent. Error monitoring may use Sentry with sanitized technical context when enabled.
privacy.rights: You can export your album from Settings and request account deletion as described in the product documentation.

terms.title: Terms of use
terms.intro: The service is provided as-is for personal sticker collection management during the MVP phase.
terms.use: Do not misuse the service, attempt unauthorized access, or upload unlawful content through support channels.
terms.liability: The operator is not liable for album data loss beyond reasonable efforts to maintain cloud availability.
